quotes.text: Your culture isn't what you say. It's what you tolerate.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build a great culture is to hire for values first, skills second. Skills can be taught. Values can't.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team should celebrate wins, not just survived losses. Recognition is fuel.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team should be able to challenge any decision, including the CEO's. If they can't, you have a dictatorship.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build a culture of ownership is to give people ownership. Not just tasks. Ownership.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to beat competition is to build something they can't copy: your culture, your taste, your community.
quotes.author: based
